mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pipeline_job_execution (execution_id, job_order, job_type, job_name, job_id, status) VALUES
(#{executionId}, #{je.jobOrder}, #{je.jobType}, #{je.jobName}, #{je.jobId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, job_order, job_type, job_name, job_id, status, log, started_at, completed_at FROM pipeline_job_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} ORDER BY job_order
mapper.update: UPDATE pipeline_job_execution SET status = #{status}, log = #{log}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RUNNING' AND started_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE started_at END, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, job_order, job_type, job_name, job_id, status, log, started_at, completed_at FROM pipeline_job_execution WHERE status = 'WAITING_WEBHOOK' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute' * #{minutes}
